content: Python is a high-level, interpreted programming language known for its readability.
RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) combines a retrieval step with a generative model to ground answers in retrieved documents.
A vector database stores high-dimensional embeddings and supports similarity search via cosine or dot-product distance.
Sentence transformers produce dense sentence embeddings used for semantic search and clustering.
Groq provides high-speed LLM inference through custom LPU hardware, offering low-latency token generation.
Faithfulness measures whether a generated answer is supported by the retrieved context, penalizing hallucination.
